"'''Save the ''Mantaris!'''''" is a [[Wizards of the Coast]] web supplement written by [[Steve Miller]]. It is a side adventure based on the sourcebook ''[[Secrets of Naboo]]'', where the players investigate sabotage on the [[Mantaris-class amphibious medium transport|''Mantaris'']] voyage.

==Plot summary==
Following the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], there is a new era of cooperation between the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] and the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]]. They are launching the [[Mantaris-class amphibious medium transport|Mantaris transport]] to colonize the moons, but there are factions that want to prevent that. A group of [[spacer]]s are deployed to investigate and remove sabotage after rescuing a captured engineer.
